lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I journey on this ship?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: You need to be searched before you can board.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Because Asgarnia has banned the import of intoxicating spirits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Search away, I have nothing to hide.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Well you've got some odd stuff, but it's all legal. Now you need to pay a boarding charge of 30 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Hang on a sec... Aren't those Karamja gloves? I thought I'd seen you helping around the island. You can go on half price mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'll not bother then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or perhaps you could let me travel for free?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Yes, perhaps I could. Okay, jump aboard then.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Aha, trying to smuggle rum are we?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... it's for personal use?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is not the Karamja rum you are looking for.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: This is not the Karamja rum we are looking for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that was easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Drat...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not putting your hands on my things!

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: You're not getting on this ship then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does Karamja have any unusual customs then?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: I'm not that sort of customs officer.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I journey on this ship?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Hey, I know you, you work at the plantation.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: I don't think you'll try smuggling anything, you just need to pay a boarding charge of 30 coins.

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Spot inspection. You don't mind do you?

lines.speaker: Customs officer
lines.text: Aha, trying to smuggle rum eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... it's for personal use?
